---
title: "Counter-Strike Economy Analysis"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

This project analyzes the impact of economy management on professional Counter-Strike player win rates. You can explore the raw Python data models or view the final synthesized report using the tabs below.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Supervised Model
```{=html}
<iframe src="cs-economy-supervised.html" width="100%" height="1000px" style="border: none; border-radius: 8px;"></iframe>
```

## Unsupervised Model
```{=html}
<iframe src="cs-economy-unsupervised.html" width="100%" height="1000px" style="border: none; border-radius: 8px;"></iframe>
```

## Final Report (PDF)
<br>
The final written report summarizing the methodology, insights, and conclusions of the economic data models. 
<br>
```{=html}
<iframe src="cs-economy-report.pdf" width="100%" height="1200px" style="border: none; border-radius: 8px;"></iframe>
```
:::
